'''yasodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thaa|thaa]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-s-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thaa|thaa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yasodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæsedeth|yæsedeth]] || [[word:yæsedej|yæsedej]] || [[word:yæsedesh|yæsedesh]] || [[word:yæsede|yæsede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yasosodoth|yasosodoth]] || [[word:yasosodoj|yasosodoj]] || [[word:yasosodosh|yasosodosh]] || [[word:yasosodo|yasosodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yasodoth|yasodoth]] || [[word:yasodoj|yasodoj]] || [[word:yasodosh|yasodosh]] || [[word:yasodo|yasodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yasofdoth|yasofdoth]] || [[word:yasofdoj|yasofdoj]] || [[word:yasofdosh|yasofdosh]] || [[word:yasofdof|yasofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yasodotho|yasodotho]] || [[word:yasodojo|yasodojo]] || [[word:yasodosho|yasodosho]] || [[word:yasodoko|yasodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yasodoth|yasodoth]] || [[word:yasodoj|yasodoj]] || [[word:yasodosh|yasodosh]] || [[word:yasodo|yasodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yasodothol|yasodothol]] || [[word:yasodojol|yasodojol]] || [[word:yasodoshol|yasodoshol]] || [[word:yasodokol|yasodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yasodothotho|yasodothotho]] || [[word:yasodojojo|yasodojojo]] || [[word:yasodoshosho|yasodoshosho]] || [[word:yasodoko|yasodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yasodothon|yasodothon]] || [[word:yasodojon|yasodojon]] || [[word:yasodoshon|yasodoshon]] || [[word:yasodokon|yasodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yasodothoro|yasodothoro]] || [[word:yasodojoro|yasodojoro]] || [[word:yasodoshoro|yasodoshoro]] || [[word:yasodokoro|yasodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
